meaning: n.冗长的句子(文章),样板,泥水匠用的匀泥尺,刮板
examples: Not getting your screed level causing water to set.
The interior is monochrome, and only the screed floor stands out in pink.
The screed is: transparency is okay except for those things they don’t want to be transparent.
The pro-whaling screed was approved by a much thinner margin: 33 votes to 32.
This screed against the 410(k) mentality, however, is not a call for expansion of government programs.
